description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a compact, angular frame and a matte, dark finish. The slide is straight-edged and extends the full length of the frame, with a squared-off muzzle and minimal external features. The grip is robust and slightly contoured, designed for ergonomic handling, and appears to have a subtle, non-reflective texture. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, providing ample space for finger placement and added structural strength. The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without any visible extensions or finger rests. No visible markings, engravings, or decorative elements are present on the slide or frame, giving the handgun a utilitarian and understated appearance.
description: A compact, matte-finished semi-automatic handgun with a robust, contoured grip and a squared-off slide. The design is utilitarian, with minimal external features and a flush magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the grip, trigger guard, and slide.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off muzzle and the narrow width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, trigger guard, and slide from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the slide, with the sight alignment visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and slightly contoured, with a subtle matte texture that appears to provide a secure hold. It lacks visible checkering or stippling but has a smooth, non-reflective finish. The shape is ergonomic, designed to fit comfortably in the hand, and there are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and thick, offering ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, with no visible reinforcement or texturing.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a straight, unadorned profile. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior finish matches the matte, dark appearance of the rest of the handgun.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and minimal profile. There are no extensions, finger rests, logos, or texturing visible on the floorplate.
